meta.note: Authoritative public standards, specs and codes that govern how each street issue is repaired. Each document is version-tracked and re-checked on the refresh cadence; status flips to 'revised' when a newer edition is found.

documents.title: Caltrans Standard Specifications
documents.summary: Statewide standard for roadway/pavement construction and repair; baseline many CA cities reference.

documents.title: Standard Specifications for Public Works Construction (Greenbook)
documents.summary: The 'Greenbook' — model public-works construction spec used by LA and many CA cities; revised every three years.

documents.title: Public Right-of-Way Accessibility Guidelines (PROWAG)
documents.currentRevision: 2023 Final Rule (eff. 2023-09-07; adopted by US DOT 2024-12-18)
documents.summary: Federal accessibility standard for sidewalks, curb ramps, crosswalks and pedestrian facilities in the public right-of-way.

documents.title: California Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (CA MUTCD)
documents.summary: State standard for traffic signs, markings and signals. Recently updated — a live example of why the corpus is re-checked periodically.

documents.title: Bureau of Street Lighting Design Standards & Guidelines
documents.issuer: City of Los Angeles, Bureau of Street Lighting
documents.summary: LA's street-lighting design standards; references the latest Greenbook and BSL Special Specifications.

documents.title: LA Municipal Code, Art. 14 §49.84 — Graffiti Removal & Recovery
documents.summary: LA's graffiti abatement law; declares graffiti visible from public view a nuisance subject to abatement.

documents.title: LA Sanitation — Illegal Dumping & Bulky-Item program
documents.issuer: City of Los Angeles, LA Sanitation (LASAN)
documents.summary: LASAN handles illegal dumping and bulky-item pickup; exact municipal-code section to be confirmed at next refresh.

documents.title: SF Public Works — Standard Specifications & Plans
documents.issuer: City & County of San Francisco, Public Works
documents.summary: SF Public Works engineering standard specifications and standard plans for streets and sidewalks.

documents.title: San Francisco Street & Sidewalk Maintenance Standards
documents.summary: SF's adopted street/sidewalk maintenance standards used for inspections and condition scoring.

documents.title: SF Public Works — Graffiti standard (zero tolerance; ~48-hr public removal)
documents.issuer: City & County of San Francisco, Public Works
documents.summary: SF's zero-tolerance graffiti policy; graffiti on public property removed within ~48 hours. SF Public Works Code article to be confirmed.
